question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/util/DomainUtils.java -> Scope: Medium: Incorrect or missing records exported to mirror nodes'] [Function: trim(byte[])] Can an unprivileged external user trigger a code path where a contract storage value with leading zero bytes is passed to trim(), causing the leading zeros to be stripped, and the mirror node to export an incorrect (shorter) storage value that does not match the on-chain value?
